title: grastidium heteroglossum
intro: Grastidium heteroglossum, also known as the sticky panicled grass or knawel, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Grastidium heteroglossum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Grastidium heteroglossum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
